_comment: The opening — plays once on the very first join of a fresh pack world, right after the auto-install provisions it (AutoInstall dispatches cutscene play opening). INSTALL HOLD (2026-07-21): this scene fires while the pack is still installing and the world is streaming chunks, so the camera would otherwise sweep over ungenerated/loading terrain. The FIRST keyframe is now a still HOLD (ticks:90) that duplicates the original opening position/angles — the camera sits locked on the title card (startTitle renders on tick 1 and stays up) while install + chunk streaming settle, THEN the original lift/drift/settle path runs unchanged. The camera lifts from outside Mom's house (2607.5/109/2847.5), drifts high over Sango Town, glances toward the lab hill (2674.5/128/2901.5), and settles back at the door. Corporate cold open — the game title card §eThe Cobblemon Initiative§r over a Company, Inc. internal-memo subtitle (foreshadows the villain org without naming the Founder). startTitleStay:130 (vs the 10/70/20 engine default) holds the title across the ~120t install hold so it does not fade off a still shot — showrunner 2026-07-21, 'show it a little longer'. NOTE: 'The Cobblemon Initiative' is 24 chars, right at the ~24-char clip limit for vanilla 4x titles at GUI scale 3 — kept non-bold so it fits; if it clips on a narrow window, shorten or drop GUI scale. FLAG: the 90-tick hold is a fixed guess — on a slow disk/first-gen world it may need lengthening (chunks still popping in when the camera starts moving); on a fast SSD it may feel long. Tune the hold's ticks after a real fresh-install run. TODO(showrunner): nudge keyframes to the town skyline.

cues.subtitle: §8Nobody files a report about a quiet town
